data.body:
Investigation complete. INTERMEDIATE tier.

Root cause 1 (test-flock-busybox-compat.sh): PATH directory filtering removes /usr/bin AND /bin (Ubuntu symlink) from PATH. ticket-lib-api.sh calls sed at line 777 — first tool to exit 127 under set -euo pipefail — aborting the subshell. Script exits quickly with no output.

Root cause 2 (test-poetry-graceful-degradation.sh): pre-commit is system-installed on Ubuntu 24.04 CI runners. reinstall-hooks.sh finds it and runs 'pre-commit install --hook-type <type>' 3 times. On cold CI runner, pre-commit initializes ~/.cache/pre-commit/db.db (SQLite), which stalls up to 30s per invocation x3 = 90s = test file timeout.

Fix 1: Replace PATH-directory filtering in test_ticket_create_without_flock with shadow flock binary (always exits non-zero, no util-linux output). Prepend to full original PATH. All /usr/bin tools remain accessible.

Fix 2: Add 'timeout 20' wrapper around reinstall-hooks.sh invocation in Test 7. exit 124 is accepted as valid degradation by the existing assert logic.
